data.summary: Post-meeting brief for Magnolia Home & Garden Q3 catalog review.

closingText.text: Today's Magnolia Q3 catalog review produced 5 action items: send catalog preview to Rachel by Friday, resolve claim CLM-0892, re-quote Q-2401 with 90-day terms, schedule May 21 follow-up, and draft a 3-year renewal proposal for July 1. Renewal is on track. Want me to create tasks or a recap email?
